title: Fable 5 is never coming back, here's why
summary: David Ondrej reports that Fable 5 has been banned and frames this as the beginning of a permanent underclass. The video appears to discuss implications of open-source AI and product availability.
writeup: David Ondrej reports that Fable 5 has been banned and argues it will not return. The video frames this development as the start of a permanent underclass and touches on the implications of open-source AI and product availability. The grounded takeaway is the claim that the ban is permanent, tied to broader concerns about access to AI products.
